# Executive Writing Coach
> Personalized writing coaching for students and professionals by Rachel Brind.

## About
Rachel Brind is a UPenn Linguistics graduate (Magna Cum Laude), Lawrenceville School alumna (High Honors), former Philadelphia Weekly fact-checking editor, and experienced writing coach. She works with students on college admissions essays, personal statements, and CommonApp essays, as well as adult professionals on business writing, resumes, and cover letters. She volunteers with Mighty Writers Philadelphia, tutoring children in underserved communities.

## Services
- College admissions essay coaching (CommonApp, personal statements, supplemental essays)
- Graduate school application essay coaching
- Resume and cover letter writing
- Business and professional writing coaching
- Grammar and punctuation refreshers
- Academic writing support
